A new step titled 'Assay Execution' exists and its content includes the text '96-well microplate'.
A new step titled 'Measurement and Analysis' exists and its content includes the text '595 nm'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the protocol management application GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons, typing in text fields, or using the application's interface rather than running terminal commands or scripts to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser DevTools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's Developer Tools (Elements tab, Console) being open to manually alter the DOM text.

integrity.description: The protocol changes were properly saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the protocol in a saved or published state within the application, not just actively being typed in an unsaved editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target protocol is 'Bradford Protein Assay (Draft)'. The agent must replace the 'Full Procedure' step with exactly four steps: 1. 'Reagent Preparation' (must contain '2000 ug/mL' and a bolded sentence starting with 'WARNING: Coomassie dye'), 2. 'Sample Preparation' (must contain '1:10'), 3. 'Assay Execution' (must contain '96-well microplate'), and 4. 'Measurement and Analysis' (must contain '595 nm').
